programme.title: The Lap
programme.desc: (G) This episode begins in Ceduna, SA, before traversing the iconic Nullarbor Plains. The journey highlights the lifeline of roadhouses and the desolate beauty of the landscape.

programme.title: The Lap
programme.desc: Drive provides automotive reviews, car culture stories, and expert insights on vehicles and the motoring industry.

programme.title: Drive Tv: Vehicle Insights
programme.desc: Drive provides automotive reviews, car culture stories, and expert insights on vehicles and the motoring industry.

programme.title: The Lap
programme.desc: (G) The journey continues through Broome and Kununurra to the Northern Territory. Navigating the vast roads of the NT is a test, but the team perseveres through the Outback.

programme.title: The Lap
programme.desc: Drive provides automotive reviews, car culture stories, and expert insights on vehicles and the motoring industry.
